name: Chinese Cucumber Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the cukes if desired, cut lengthwise, and scrape out any large seeds.
2. Slice to 1/4 inch thick.
3. Soak in salted ice water for 30 minutes.
4. Drain.
5. Mix sauce ingredients and pour over drained cukes.
6. Let stand 30 minutes prior to serving (standing up to 2 hours is acceptable; longer may cause the cucles to become too marinated).
